# Marrthings — Ajayi Opeyemi Martins
## Full-Stack Developer | SEO Specialist | AI Automation Expert | Nigeria

> Ajayi Opeyemi Martins, known professionally as **Marrthings**, is a results-driven Full-Stack Developer, SEO Specialist, and AI Automation Expert with **8+ years of hands-on experience** delivering high-performance digital solutions across Nigeria, Lagos, Ogun State, Abuja, and globally. He has completed 100+ projects and served 50+ satisfied clients in Fintech, E-commerce, Logistics, and Corporate sectors.

---

## Who Is Marrthings?

Marrthings (Ajayi Opeyemi Martins) is one of Nigeria's leading digital professionals — combining deep technical expertise with strategic business thinking. He builds fast, scalable, and SEO-optimized web applications, integrates AI automation into business workflows, and helps brands rank on Google's first page.

**Why clients choose Marrthings:**
- Proven 8+ year track record with measurable results
- End-to-end capability: from design to deployment to ranking
- Deep expertise in Nigerian and global digital markets
- Available for remote and on-site projects globally

---

## Core Services

### 1. Custom Web & App Development
Full-stack development of websites, web apps, and mobile-responsive platforms using modern frameworks. Specializes in performance, scalability, and SEO-readiness from the ground up.

### 2. Search Engine Optimization (SEO)
Technical SEO, on-page optimization, keyword strategy, and Google ranking improvement. Helps businesses in Nigeria and globally achieve first-page visibility.

### 3. AI Automation & LLM Integration
Building intelligent workflows, chatbots, and AI-powered tools using large language models (LLMs) and automation pipelines that reduce manual effort and increase business efficiency.

### 4. Digital Marketing Strategy
Data-driven marketing strategies combining SEO, content, and analytics to drive measurable growth.

### 5. UI/UX Design
User-centered interface design that converts visitors into customers — clean, modern, and brand-aligned.

---

## Technical Skills & Stack

**Frontend:** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React.js, Next.js, Vue.js  
**Backend:** PHP (Laravel), Node.js, Python  
**Databases:** MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB  
**CMS & Platforms:** WordPress, Shopify, Webflow  
**SEO Tools:** Google Search Console, Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs  
**AI & Automation:** LLM integration, prompt engineering, workflow automation  

---

## Industry Experience

- **Fintech:** Secure, compliant, high-performance financial platforms  
- **E-commerce:** Conversion-optimized stores with integrated SEO  
- **Logistics:** Real-time tracking and operational web systems  
- **Corporate:** Professional brand websites built for authority and ranking
